preconditions.name: Low-Float & Microcap Dynamics
preconditions.description: Very small number of shares available for public trading. Even moderate buying pressure causes disproportionate price spikes.

preconditions.name: Short Squeeze Setup
preconditions.description: High short interest as percentage of float. Positive surprise forces covering, creating feedback loop.

examples.detail: High SI led to massive squeeze during airport chaos
Vertical price movement from short covering

preconditions.name: Debt Distress & Restructuring Setup
preconditions.description: High debt-to-equity, negative earnings, low current ratio. Any positive restructuring news causes massive rerating.

preconditions.name: Exchange Compliance Risk
preconditions.description: Stock trading near $1.00 minimum bid price for exchange listing. Compliance recovery triggers rally as delisting fear lifts.

examples.detail: Regained Nasdaq compliance after deficiency notice
Removed delisting fears by regaining compliance
Rallied following efforts to cure minimum bid price

preconditions.name: High Insider Ownership
preconditions.description: Directors, CEOs, or major holders aggressively accumulating shares. Signals conviction that stock is undervalued.

examples.detail: Massive institutional insider vote of confidence
Five insider disclosure filings in late March

preconditions.name: Microcap with Catalyst Potential
preconditions.description: Very small market cap (<$300M). Any material news can move the stock 50-500% because the entire company is priced for nothing.

preconditions.name: Near 52-Week Low / Oversold
preconditions.description: Stock trading near its 52-week low or with extremely low RSI. Snap-back rallies from oversold conditions trigger algorithmic buying.

examples.detail: RSI plummeted to 10.49 triggering oversold bounce
Triggered automated buy signals from quant systems

preconditions.name: Hot Sector Exposure
preconditions.description: Company operates in AI, space, biotech, clean energy, or other sectors receiving outsized capital flows.

preconditions.name: Revenue/Earnings Growth Trajectory
preconditions.description: Strong revenue or earnings growth not yet fully priced in. Gap between forward PE and trailing PE suggests market expects acceleration.

catalysts.name: Speculative Retail & Social Momentum
catalysts.description: Coordinated retail trading from Discord, Reddit, X. Viral sentiment overwhelms valuation.

catalysts.name: Strategic Business Pivot
catalysts.description: Company fundamentally changes core business into high-growth sector. Market revalues based on new TAM.

catalysts.name: Legal Victory & Litigation Breakthrough
catalysts.description: Favorable court ruling or settlement removes existential threat or validates IP.

examples.detail: Final legal victory against Apple in China highest court

catalysts.name: Macro & Geopolitical Supply Shocks
catalysts.description: External global events create supply shortages or demand spikes for company products.

examples.detail: Refinery closures + Strait of Hormuz blockade

catalysts.name: Major Partnership or Contract Win
catalysts.description: High-value contract or partnership with credible counterparty validates technology and provides revenue path.

examples.detail: MOU with major Middle Eastern group

catalysts.name: Earnings Outperformance
catalysts.description: Financial results significantly exceed expectations, often paired with accelerated profitability guidance.

examples.detail: $100M cost savings guidance + positive EBITDA timeline

catalysts.name: Clinical or Regulatory Milestone
catalysts.description: Positive trial data, FDA approval, or EU MDR certification de-risks pipeline.

catalysts.name: Management Overhaul
catalysts.description: New C-suite or board members signal commitment to better capital allocation.

examples.detail: Cooperation agreement with Endeavor for board overhaul
Former NGA director appointed to board

catalysts.name: M&A Activity
catalysts.description: Definitive acquisition agreement or credible buyout rumors. Stock gaps to offer price.

catalysts.name: Ticker Confusion & Algorithmic Error
catalysts.description: Stock surges because ticker is similar to trending company or news topic.

examples.detail: Spiked on MFN trade policy news
